articles.title: $SOL: What is Firedancer and Why It Is So Important for the Future of Solana Blockchain and Its Ecosystem
articles.description: Introduction Firedancer represents a fresh validator client designed for the Solana blockchain. At present, the entire Solana network relies on the original validator client, developed by Solana Labs. While this existing client is effective, it was created in a fast-paced startup setting, leaving room for optimization. Jump Crypto, a division of the Jump Trading Group, […]
